"'''Living Force: One Minute to Midnight'''" is a short story in the [[Living Force (roleplaying campaign)|Living Force campaign]]. It was written by [[August Hahn|August]] and [[Cynthia Hahn]] and was published on the [[Wizards of the Coast]] website on [[March 2]], [[2006]]. It continued the saga of [[Darrus Jeht/Legends|Darrus Jeht]], following on from the short story ''[[Living Force: Dark Shadows]]''. The story was followed by ''[[Living Force: Last Stand]]'' which concluded the Jeht story arc.

==Plot summary==
Having decided to disobey orders, [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Darrus Jeht/Legends|Darrus Jeht]] prepares to return to the [[Cularin system/Legends|Cularin system]]. While ''en route'' to the hangar bay to greet the last of returning clone troopers under his command, he receives a vision through the Force of his friend [[Aayla Secura/Legends|Aayla Secura]] being attacked and killed by clone troopers. Given this warning of [[Order 66/Legends|Order 66]], Jeht is prepared for his own clone troopers' attack and manages to turn the tables and kill them instead.
